H3400.derivation: from H3384 (יָרָה) and H410 (אֵל); thrown of God;

H3401.strongs_def: literally he will contend; properly, adjective, contentious; used as noun, an adversary

H3402.strongs_def: Jarib, the name of three Israelites

H3404.derivation: or יְרִיָּהוּ; from H3384 (יָרָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will throw;

H3405.derivation: or יְרֵחוֹ; or variation (1 Kings 16:34) יְרִיחֹה; perhaps from H3394 (יָרֵחַ); its month; or else from H7306 (רוּחַ); fragrant;
H3405.strongs_def: Jericho or Jerecho, a place in Palestine

H3406.derivation: or יְרֵימוֹת; or יְרֵמוֹת; feminine plural from H7311 (רוּם); elevations;
H3406.strongs_def: Jerimoth or Jeremoth, the name of twelve Israelites
H3406.kjv_def: Jermoth, Jerimoth, and Ramoth (from the margin).

H3409.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be soft;
H3409.strongs_def: the thigh (from its fleshy softness); by euphemistically the generative parts; figuratively, a shank, flank, side

H3411.strongs_def: properly, the flank; but used only figuratively, the rear or recess

H3412.strongs_def: Jarmuth, the name of two places in Palestine

H3414.derivation: or יִרְמְיָהוּ; from H7311 (רוּם) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will rise;
H3414.strongs_def: Jirmejah, the name of eight or nine Israelites

H3415.strongs_def: properly, to be broken up (with any violent action) i.e. (figuratively) to fear
H3415.kjv_def: be grevious (only Isaiah 15:4; the rest belong to H7489 (רָעַע)).
H3415.usage: displease(9x), grieved(4x), grievous(3x), evil(2x), ill(2x), harm(1x), sad(1x)

H3416.derivation: from H7495 (רָפָא) and H410 (אֵל); God will heal;

H3418.derivation: from H3417 (יָרָק) (in the sense of vacuity of color);
H3418.strongs_def: properly, pallor, i.e. hence, the yellowish green of young and sickly vegetation; concretely, verdure, i.e. grass or vegetation

H3420.strongs_def: paleness, whether of persons (from fright), or of plants (from drought)

H3421.derivation: from H7324 (רוּק) and H5971 (עַם); people will be poured forth;

H3423.strongs_def: to occupy (by driving out previous tenants, and possessing in their place); by implication, to seize, to rob, to inherit; also to expel, to impoverish, to ruin
H3423.kjv_def: cast out, consume, destroy, disinherit, dispossess, drive(-ing) out, enjoy, expel, [idiom] without fail, (give to, leave for) inherit(-ance, -or) [phrase] magistrate, be (make) poor, come to poverty, (give to, make to) possess, get (have) in (take) possession, seize upon, succeed, [idiom] utterly.
H3423.usage: possess(116x), inherit(21x), heir(10x), possession(6x), succeed(5x), dispossess(4x), poverty(3x), drive(2x), enjoy(2x), poor(2x), expelled(2x), utterly(2x)

H3425.strongs_def: something occupied; a conquest; also a patrimony

H3426.derivation: perhaps from an unused root meaning to stand out, or exist; entity; used adverbially or as a copula for the substantive verb (H1961 (הָיָה));
H3426.strongs_def: there is or are (or any other form of the verb to be, as may suit the connection)
H3426.kjv_def: (there) are, (he, it, shall, there, there may, there shall, there should) be, thou do, had, hast, (which) hath, (I, shalt, that) have, (he, it, there) is, substance, it (there) was, (there) were, ye will, thou wilt, wouldest.

H3427.strongs_def: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
H3427.kjv_def: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurking, [idiom] marry(-ing), (bring again to) place, remain, return, seat, set(-tle), (down-) sit(-down, still, -ting down, -ting (place) -uate), take, tarry.
H3427.usage: dwell(437x), inhabitant(221x), sit(172x), abide(70x), inhabit(39x), down(26x), remain(23x), in(22x), tarry(19x), set(14x), continue(5x), place(7x), still(5x), taken(5x)

H3428.derivation: from H3427 (יָשַׁב) and H1 (אָב); seat of (his) father;

H3429.derivation: from the active participle of H3427 (יָשַׁב) and H7674 (שֶׁבֶת), with a preposition and the article interposed; sitting in the seat;

H3430.derivation: from H3427 (יָשַׁב) and H5011 (נֹב), with a pronominal suffix and a preposition interposed; his dwelling (is) in Nob;

H3432.strongs_def: a Jashubite, or descendant of Jashub

H3433.derivation: from H7725 (שׁוּב) and H3899 (לֶחֶם); returner of bread;
H3433.kjv_def: Jashubi-lehem. (Prob. the text should be pointed יֹשְׁבֵי לֶחֶם and rendered '(they were) inhabitants of Lechem,' i.e. of Bethlehem (by contraction). Compare H3902 (לַחְמִי)).

H3434.derivation: from H7725 (שׁוּב) and H5971 (עַם); people will return;
H3434.strongs_def: Jashobam, the name of two or three Israelites

H3435.derivation: from an unused root corresponding to H7662 (שְׁבַק); he will leave;

H3436.derivation: from H3427 (יָשַׁב) and H7186 (קָשֶׁה); a hard seat;

H3437.derivation: or יָשִׁיב; from H7725 (שׁוּב); he will return;
H3437.strongs_def: Jashub, the name of two Israelites

H3439.derivation: from the same as H3445 (יֶשַׁח) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will empty;

H3440.strongs_def: Jishvi, the name of two Israelites

H3441.strongs_def: a Jishvite (collectively) or descendants of Jishvi

H3442.strongs_def: Jeshua, the name of ten Israelites, also of a place in Palestine
H3442.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3443.strongs_def: {Jeshua, the name of ten Israelites, also of a place in Palestine}

H3444.strongs_def: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
H3444.kjv_def: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.
H3444.usage: salvation(65x), help(4x), deliverance(3x), health(3x), save(1x), saving(1x), welfare(1x)

H3445.derivation: from an unused root meaning to gape (as the empty stomach);

H3448.derivation: by Aramaic אִישַׁי; from the same as H3426 (יֵשׁ); extant;

H3449.derivation: or יִשִּׁיָּהוּ; from H5383 (נָשָׁה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will lend;
H3449.strongs_def: Jishshijah, the name of five Israelites

H3450.derivation: from H7760 (שׂוּם) and H410 (אֵל); God will place;

H3455.strongs_def: to place; intransitively, to be placed

H3458.derivation: from H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H410 (אֵל); God will hear;
H3458.strongs_def: Jishmael, the name of Abraham's oldest son, and of five Israelites

H3459.strongs_def: a Jishmaelite or descendant of Jishmael

H3460.derivation: or יִשְׁמַעְיָהוּlemma יְשְׁמַעְיָהוּ first vowel, corrected to יִשְׁמַעְיָהוּ; from H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will hear;
H3460.strongs_def: Jishmajah, the name of two Israelites

H3462.strongs_def: properly, to be slack or languid, i.e. (by implication) sleep (figuratively, to die); also to grow old, stale or inveterate

H3467.strongs_def: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
H3467.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

H3469.strongs_def: Jishi, the name of four Israelites

H3470.derivation: or יְשַׁעְיָהוּ; from H3467 (יָשַׁע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has saved;
H3470.strongs_def: Jeshajah, the name of seven Israelites

H3471.derivation: from an unused root meaning to polish;
H3471.strongs_def: a gem supposed to be jasper (from the resemblance in name)

H3472.derivation: perhaps from H8192 (שָׁפָה); he will scratch;

H3473.derivation: probably from the same as H8227 (שָׁפָן); he will hide;

H3474.strongs_def: to be straight or even; figuratively, to be (causatively, to make) right, pleasant, prosperous
H3474.kjv_def: direct, fit, seem good (meet), [phrase] please (will), be (esteem, go) right (on), bring (look, make, take the) straight (way), be upright(-ly).

H3478.derivation: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

H3480.derivation: by variation from H3477 (יָשָׁר) and H410 (אֵל) with directive enclitic; right towards God;

H3482.strongs_def: a Jisreelitess or female descendant of Jisrael

H3484.strongs_def: Jeshurun, a symbolic name for Israel

H3485.derivation: (strictly yis-saws-kawr'); from H5375 (נָשָׂא) and H7939 (שָׂכָר); he will bring a reward;
H3485.pos: proper collective noun, proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3486.derivation: from an unused root meaning to blanch;

H3487.strongs_def: a sign of the object of a verb

H3489.derivation: from an unused root meaning to pin through or fast;

H3490.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be lonely;

H3491.strongs_def: properly, what is left, i.e. (by implication) a gleaning

H3494.derivation: probably from H8518 (תָּלָה); it will hang, i.e. be high;

H3495.derivation: from the same as H3490 (יָתוֹם); orphanage;

H3496.derivation: from an unused root meaning to endure, and H410 (אֵל); continued of God;

H3497.derivation: from the same as H8577 (תַּנִּין); extensive;

H3498.strongs_def: to jut over or exceed; by implication, to excel; (intransitively) to remain or be left; causatively, to leave, cause to abound, preserve
H3498.kjv_def: excel, leave (a remnant), left behind, too much, make plenteous, preserve, (be, let) remain(-der, -ing, -nant), reserve, residue, rest.

H3499.strongs_def: properly, an overhanging, i.e. (by implication) an excess, superiority, remainder; also a small rope (as hanging free)
H3499.kjv_def: [phrase] abundant, cord, exceeding, excellancy(-ent), what they leave, that hath left, plentifully, remnant, residue, rest, string, with.
